chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-3565 of 2023 CP No.D-3740 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.16577/2023 3. For hearing of main case 01.09.2025 Mr. Larosh Juman, advocate holds brief for Mr. Ayan Mustafa Memon, advocate for the respondents Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- These both are old petitions of 2023, which are over 02 years ago. On the last date of hearing i.e. 20.02.2024, which is about 18 months ago, none was present on behalf of petitioners without intimation. Once-again, today, despite the lapse of 18 months, learned counsel for the petitioners are called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing these old petitions, which are accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith pending application(s). A copy of this order shall be placed in connected petition. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
